Feedback.title: Feedback
Feedback.description: Public comments and ratings with anti-spam rate limiting and profanity filtering.

id.description: The unique ID of the feedback.

name.description: The public display name of the commenter.

rating.description: The user rating ranging from 1 to 5.

Rubric.title: Rubric
Rubric.description: An analytic rubric containing evaluation criteria and grade transmutations conforming to DepEd JHS/SHS standards.

id.description: The unique ID of the rubric.

title.description: The custom title chosen by the educator.

gradeLevel.description: The JHS/SHS Grade level (e.g. Grade 9, Grade 11).

subject.description: The academic subject / course name (e.g. English, AP).

assessmentType.description: The assessment task typologies (e.g. Essay, Research).

description.description: Educator's brief overview of the assessment goals.

criteria.description: List of individual criterion objects assessing proficiency.

userId.description: The owner educator's UID from Firebase Auth.

GradingSession.title: GradingSession
GradingSession.description: An class grading log session where student portfolios are recorded and calculated.

id.description: The unique ID of the grading session.

rubricId.description: Reference matching the evaluated rubric's ID.

title.description: Class identifier or descriptive grading round title.

students.description: Class roll containing scores, custom feedback paragraphs, and transmutations.

depEdMode.description: Whether to apply Department of Education (DepEd) transmutations (60% cut-off).

userId.description: The owner educator's UID from Firebase Auth.

/feedback/{feedbackId}.description: Public comments and ratings with real-time listeners for the support feed and dashboard.

/rubrics/{rubricId}.description: Collection where saved analytic rubrics are curated and shared by authenticated users.

/sessions/{sessionId}.description: Collection storing class grading sessions, logs, transmuted scores, and generated diagnostic paragraphs.
